title: lighting
description: Want to express player death more? Or are you organizing an event where players can die only once? Then this plugin will help you express more attention to player deaths, or decorate a pvp event with beautiful lightning!
body:
Want to express player death more? Or are you organizing an event where players can die only once? Then this plugin will help you express more attention to player deaths, or decorate a pvp event with beautiful lightning!

When a player dies, the plugin registers this event and summons a lightning strike at the location of the player's death!The lightning strike will be in all worlds (in the Overworld, in the Nether and in the End). Lightning is only a cosmetic effect and will not cause damage to players or loot dropped by a dead player. Use this plugin at your event to make player kills more spectacular!
